title: Umami Velvety Brazilian Tofu Stir-fry
description: A one-pot dish featuring umami-rich tofu stir-fried with oregano and smoked paprika in a sugar-free sauce, perfect for a quick dinner or snack.

ingredients.name: 4 cloves garlic
ingredients.amount: 3-4 pieces whole, crushed or minced finely

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons oregano leaves
ingredients.notes: For extra smokiness, consider using smoked oregano

ingredients.name: 1 teaspoon smoked paprika
ingredients.notes: Can be replaced with regular paprika if desired

ingredients.name: Juice of 1 lime
ingredients.notes: Use fresh for best flavor, omit for sugar-free version

ingredients.name: Dash of black pepper
ingredients.amount: unspecified but usually about a pinch

instructions: Grate the tofu and place in a large mixing bowl.
Chop the onion, garlic, and prepare other ingredients. Add them to the mixing bowl with the tofu.
Sprinkle salt and pepper over the mixture. Mix well to combine.
Transfer the mixture into an oven-safe baking dish. Spread evenly.
Drizzle lime juice over the dish. Bake for about 25 minutes or until golden brown on top and cooked through.
Meanwhile, prepare a sugar-free sauce by mixing oregano leaves, smoked paprika, salt, pepper, and any optional remaining lime juice in a small bowl. Mix well to form a paste.
After baking, stir the sauce into the dish evenly and let it cook for an additional 5 minutes or until heated through and velvety-smooth.
Serve hot as a main dish with rice or quinoa on the side.
